common.label: Common
rules: Keep the dessert identity clean and immediately readable.
Use little to no luxury effect.
Focus on the base pastry shape, core filling, and a simple mascot expression.
The mascot must feel adorable, friendly, lovable, and charming.
Never make the character scary, creepy, uncanny, sinister, aggressive, or unsettling.

rare.label: Rare
rules: Add one or two premium adornments that suit the dessert and the MBTI personality.
A subtle effect is allowed, but it must remain restrained and secondary.
The character should feel more styled and premium than common.
Pose or expression can be slightly more confident, charming, or polished than common.

superRare.label: Super Rare
rules: Add two or three premium adornments that suit the dessert and the MBTI personality.
Visible luxury rarity effects are required, such as glow, sparkle, luminous highlight, prestige lighting, or collector-style presentation.
The character must feel clearly more radiant, luxurious, and rare than the rare version.
Use a more elevated expression or flagship pose so the character looks scarce and high-end.
